251.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she attributed to the Prophet ﷺ: 'The prayer of one who sits cross-legged is worth half the prayer of one who stands.'
251.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menyandarkan kepada Nabi ﷺ: 'Shalat orang yang duduk bersila senilai setengah dari shalat orang yang berdiri.'

252.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "When Allah desires good for a household, He introduces gentleness into them."'
252.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Ketika Allah menginginkan kebaikan bagi suatu keluarga, Dia memasukkan kelembutan ke dalam mereka."'

253.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said regarding a woman who sees something suspicious after becoming ritually pure: 'It is only a vein' — or he said 'veins.'
253.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda tentang seorang wanita yang melihat sesuatu yang mencurigakan setelah suci: 'Itu hanyalah urat' — atau beliau berkata 'urat-urat.'

254.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Prophet ﷺ would sometimes wake up in a state of major impurity, then bathe, then go out to prayer — and I could hear his recitation — and he was fasting.'
254.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ terkadang bangun dalam keadaan junub, kemudian mandi, kemudian keluar untuk shalat — dan aku bisa mendengar bacaannya — dan beliau sedang berpuasa.'

255.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that her milk-brother asked her about the bathing of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. She called for a vessel of about a sa' and bathed, pouring three times over her head, with a screen between her and them.
255.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa saudara sesusunya bertanya kepadanya tentang mandi Rasulullah ﷺ. Ia meminta sebuah wadah sekitar satu sa' dan mandi, menuangkan tiga kali di atas kepalanya, dengan tabir antara dia dan mereka.

256.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'What is forbidden through breastfeeding is what is forbidden through birth.'
256.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Yang diharamkan melalui persusuan adalah apa yang diharamkan melalui kelahiran.'

257.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If a large amount of something intoxicates, then a handful of it is forbidden.'
257.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika jumlah yang banyak dari sesuatu memabukkan, maka segenggam darinya pun haram.'

258.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: "Do not drink except from a vessel that is tied shut."'
258.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Janganlah minum kecuali dari wadah yang ditutup rapat."'

259.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that during a journey she cursed her camel. The Prophet ﷺ ordered it to be returned and said: 'Let nothing accursed accompany me.'
259.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa dalam suatu perjalanan ia mengutuk untanya. Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan agar ia dikembalikan dan bersabda: 'Jangan biarkan sesuatu yang dikutuk menyertaiku.'

260.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to rest his head in her lap while she was menstruating and recite the Quran.
260.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa meletakkan kepalanya di pangkuannya sementara ia sedang haid dan membaca Al-Quran.

261.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ was asked about a man who is intimate with his wife while she is menstruating. He said: 'What is above the garment [is permissible].'
261.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ ditanya tentang seorang pria yang bercumbu dengan istrinya sementara ia sedang haid. Beliau bersabda: 'Yang di atas pakaian [boleh].'

262.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ set up a pulpit in the mosque for Hassan so he could defend him with poetry. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ then said: 'Indeed, Allah Almighty supports Hassan with the Holy Spirit to defend His Messenger.'
262.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mendirikan mimbar di masjid untuk Hassan agar ia dapat membela beliau dengan puisi. Rasulullah ﷺ kemudian bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya Allah Yang Maha Agung mendukung Hassan dengan Ruhul Qudus untuk membela Rasul-Nya.'

263.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she used to take on debts, and when asked why, she said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: "There is no servant who intends to repay his debt except that Allah Almighty helps him." So I seek that help.'
263.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia biasa berhutang, dan ketika ditanya mengapa, ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak ada seorang hamba yang berniat melunasi hutangnya kecuali Allah Yang Maha Agung membantunya." Maka aku mencari bantuan itu.'

264.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'Three things of this world were beloved to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: food, women, and perfume. He obtained two of them but not one — he obtained women and perfume but not food.'
264.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Tiga hal dari dunia ini dicintai oleh Rasulullah ﷺ: makanan, wanita, dan wewangian. Beliau mendapatkan dua di antaranya tetapi tidak satu — beliau mendapatkan wanita dan wewangian tetapi tidak makanan.'

265.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'There is no man who has a night prayer set aside but sleep overcomes him in it, except that Allah records for him the reward of his prayer, and that sleep is considered a charity given to him.'
265.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada orang yang telah menetapkan shalat malam tetapi tidur mengalahkannya, kecuali bahwa Allah mencatat pahala shalatnya untuknya, dan tidur itu dianggap sebagai sedekah yang diberikan kepadanya.'

266.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Prophet ﷺ entered and heard the sound of an infant crying. He said: "What is wrong with your infant that it is crying? Why did you not seek ruqyah for him against the evil eye?"'
266.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ masuk dan mendengar suara bayi yang menangis. Beliau bersabda: "Ada apa dengan bayi kalian yang menangis? Mengapa kalian tidak mencari ruqyah untuknya dari mata jahat?"'

267.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding a scholar of the early generations — a report about his notable knowledge and standing.
267.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai seorang ulama dari generasi awal — laporan tentang pengetahuan dan kedudukannya yang luar biasa.

268.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Seek Laylat al-Qadr in the odd nights of the last ten.'
268.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Carilah Lailatul Qadar di malam-malam ganjil dari sepuluh terakhir.'

269.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'He would pray four rak'ahs — do not ask about their length and beauty — then four more — do not ask about their beauty and length — then three. I said: "O Messenger of Allah, do you sleep before performing witr?" He said: "O Aisha, my eyes sleep but my heart does not."'
269.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Beliau shalat empat rakaat — jangan tanya tentang lamanya dan keindahannya — kemudian empat lagi — jangan tanya tentang keindahan dan lamanya — kemudian tiga. Aku berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, apakah engkau tidur sebelum melakukan witir?" Beliau bersabda: "Wahai Aisyah, mataku tidur tetapi hatiku tidak."'

270.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded that hides of dead animals may be used if they have been tanned.
270.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan agar kulit hewan yang mati dapat digunakan jika telah disamak.

271.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I heard it from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ' — referring to the verse of the middle prayer including Asr: "Guard strictly the prayers, and the middle prayer, and the Asr prayer, and stand before Allah with full devotion."'
271.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengarnya dari Rasulullah ﷺ' — merujuk pada ayat tentang shalat wustho termasuk Ashar: "Peliharalah semua shalat itu dan shalat wustho, dan shalat Ashar serta berdirilah untuk Allah dengan khusuk."'

272.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'None of you should pray in the presence of food, nor while being restrained by the two needs.'
272.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Jangan ada di antara kalian yang shalat di hadapan makanan, dan tidak pula sementara ditahan oleh dua kebutuhan.'

273.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever performs an act that is not in accordance with our matter, it is rejected.'
273.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang melakukan suatu perbuatan yang tidak sesuai dengan urusan kami, maka ia ditolak.'

274.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The sleeping mat of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was made of leather stuffed with palm fiber.'
274.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kasur tidur Rasulullah ﷺ terbuat dari kulit yang diisi dengan sabut kelapa.'

275.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed away when we were full from the two black things — water and dates.'
275.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ wafat ketika kami kenyang dari dua hal hitam — air dan kurma.'

276.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about the Prophet's ﷺ practice of reciting aloud versus quietly. She said: 'Both — sometimes quietly and sometimes aloud.' She was also asked about his bathing after major impurity, whether he bathed before sleeping or slept first. She said: 'Both — sometimes he bathed then slept, and sometimes he performed ablution and slept.'
276.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang kebiasaan Nabi ﷺ membaca keras atau pelan. Ia berkata: 'Keduanya — terkadang pelan dan terkadang keras.' Ia juga ditanya tentang mandinya setelah junub, apakah mandi sebelum tidur atau tidur dulu. Ia berkata: 'Keduanya — terkadang mandi lalu tidur, dan terkadang berwudhu dan tidur.'

277.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I was leaning him against my chest, and I looked at him until his head tilted and I thought he had passed away. Then I looked at him again and he raised his gaze and said: "With the Highest Companion in Paradise — with those upon whom Allah has bestowed favor from among the Prophets and the truthful."' And his soul departed.
277.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku menyandarkannya ke dadaku, dan aku memandangnya hingga kepalanya miring dan aku mengira beliau telah wafat. Kemudian aku memandangnya lagi dan beliau mengangkat pandangannya dan berkata: "Bersama Teman Tertinggi di surga — bersama mereka yang telah Allah berikan nikmat dari kalangan para Nabi dan orang-orang yang jujur."' Dan ruhnya pergi.

278.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever among my ummah carries a debt and strives to repay it, then dies before repaying it — I am his guardian.'
278.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa dari umatku yang menanggung hutang dan berusaha melunasinya, kemudian meninggal sebelum melunasinya — aku adalah walinya.'

279.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ prayed the Duha prayer in my house four rak'ahs.'
279.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ melaksanakan shalat Dhuha di rumahku sebanyak empat rakaat.'

280.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ was asked whether the tribe of Taym would be spared. He said: 'No. But this clan of Quraysh — death will overwhelm them, and they will be the first to perish.' She said: 'What of people after them?' He said: 'They are the core of people. When they perish, all people perish.'
280.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ ditanya apakah suku Taym akan diselamatkan. Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak. Tetapi klan Quraisy ini — kematian akan menimpa mereka, dan mereka akan menjadi yang pertama binasa.' Ia berkata: 'Bagaimana dengan orang-orang setelah mereka?' Beliau bersabda: 'Mereka adalah inti umat manusia. Ketika mereka binasa, semua orang binasa.'

281.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she and the Prophet ﷺ did that [had intercourse without ejaculation] and then bathed from it on one occasion.
281.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia dan Nabi ﷺ melakukan hal itu [berhubungan intim tanpa ejakulasi] lalu mandi karenanya pada suatu kesempatan.

282.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ forbade prayer from the time the sun rises until it has risen fully, and from when it begins to descend until it sets.
282.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ melarang shalat dari saat matahari terbit hingga ia naik sepenuhnya, dan dari saat ia mulai terbenam hingga terbenam.

283.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Prophet ﷺ prayed eleven rak'ahs between the Isha prayer and Fajr. He would give the salam after every two rak'ahs, then perform witr with one. His prostration in the voluntary prayers lasted as long as it takes one of you to recite fifty verses before raising his head. After the first adhan call for Fajr, he would stand and pray two short rak'ahs, then lie down on his right side.'
283.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ shalat sebelas rakaat antara shalat Isya dan Fajar. Beliau memberi salam setelah setiap dua rakaat, kemudian witir dengan satu rakaat. Sujudnya dalam shalat sunnah berlangsung selama yang dibutuhkan seseorang di antara kalian untuk membaca lima puluh ayat sebelum mengangkat kepalanya. Setelah adzan pertama Fajar, beliau berdiri dan shalat dua rakaat yang ringan, kemudian berbaring di sisi kanannya.'

284.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'That is Jibreel, and he conveys his greetings to you.' She said: 'And upon him be peace, the mercy of Allah, and His blessings. May Allah reward him well — what a companion and what a visitor! Sufyan said: al-dakhil means the guest.'
284.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Itu adalah Jibril, dan ia menyampaikan salam kepadamu.' Ia berkata: 'Dan atasnya salam, rahmat Allah, dan berkah-Nya. Semoga Allah membalasnya dengan kebaikan — alangkah baiknya seorang teman dan alangkah baiknya seorang tamu! Sufyan berkata: al-dakhil berarti tamu.'

285.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked the Prophet ﷺ: 'Is there jihad obligated on women?' He said: 'Yes — Hajj and Umrah. That is the jihad of women.'
285.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ: 'Apakah ada jihad yang diwajibkan atas wanita?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya — Haji dan Umrah. Itulah jihad wanita.'

286.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: "There will come upon the just judge a moment on the Day of Resurrection when he wishes he had never judged between two people over a single date."'
286.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Akan datang atas seorang hakim yang adil suatu saat pada Hari Kiamat ketika ia berharap ia tidak pernah menghakimi antara dua orang atas sebuah kurma sekalipun."'

287.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ heard a man named Shihab and said to him: 'You are Hisham [a more favorable name].'
287.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ mendengar seorang pria bernama Shihab dan berkata kepadanya: 'Kamu adalah Hisyam [nama yang lebih baik].'

288.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ summoned Uthman privately and said to him: 'O Uthman, indeed Allah will dress you in a garment. If the hypocrites want you to take it off, do not take it off for them.' He said this two or three times.
288.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ memanggil Utsman secara pribadi dan berkata kepadanya: 'Wahai Utsman, sesungguhnya Allah akan mendandanimu dengan sebuah pakaian. Jika orang-orang munafik menginginkanmu untuk melepaskannya, jangan lepaskan untuk mereka.' Beliau mengatakannya dua atau tiga kali.

289.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'If the Dajjal emerges after me, know that your Lord is not one-eyed. He will emerge from a Jewish city of Isfahan until he comes to Medina. He will then be killed by Isa, peace be upon him, who will descend near the gate of Lud in Palestine.'
289.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika Dajjal muncul setelahku, ketahuilah bahwa Tuhan kalian tidak buta sebelah. Ia akan muncul dari kota Yahudi Isfahan hingga tiba di Madinah. Kemudian ia akan dibunuh oleh Isa, semoga keselamatan atasnya, yang akan turun di dekat gerbang Lud di Palestina.'

290.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: "The circumambulation of the Kaaba, the walking between al-Safa and al-Marwa, and the casting of pebbles at the Jamarat were instituted for the establishment of the remembrance of Allah Almighty."'
290.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Tawaf mengelilingi Ka'bah, sa'i antara al-Shafa dan al-Marwah, dan melempar kerikil di Jamarat ditetapkan untuk menegakkan dzikir kepada Allah Yang Maha Agung."'

291.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked about women's trailing hems. He said: 'A handspan.' She said: 'Then their legs would be exposed.' He said: 'Then a forearm's length.'
291.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya tentang ujung pakaian wanita yang menjuntai. Beliau bersabda: 'Sejengkal.' Ia berkata: 'Maka kaki mereka akan terlihat.' Beliau bersabda: 'Maka sehasta.'

292.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked about the believers' food on the Day of Judgment. It was said: 'Glorification, praise, and exaltation of Allah.' Aisha said: 'Where will the Arabs be on that day?' He said: 'The Arabs will be few on that day.'
292.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia bertanya tentang makanan orang-orang beriman pada Hari Kiamat. Dikatakan: 'Tasbih, tahmid, dan takbir.' Aisyah berkata: 'Di mana orang-orang Arab pada hari itu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Orang-orang Arab akan sedikit pada hari itu.'

293.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a camel prostrated before the Prophet ﷺ. His companions said: 'O Messenger of Allah, animals and trees prostrate to you — we are more deserving of prostrating to you.' He said: 'Worship your Lord and honor your brother. If I were to command anyone to prostrate to anyone, I would command the woman to prostrate to her husband. If he commanded her to move from a yellow mountain to a black mountain, and from a black mountain to a white mountain, she should do so.'
293.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seekor unta bersujud di hadapan Nabi ﷺ. Para sahabatnya berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, binatang dan pohon-pohon bersujud kepadamu — kami lebih berhak bersujud kepadamu.' Beliau bersabda: 'Sembahlah Tuhan kalian dan muliakanlah saudara kalian. Jika aku harus memerintahkan seseorang untuk bersujud kepada seseorang, aku akan memerintahkan wanita untuk bersujud kepada suaminya. Jika ia memerintahkannya untuk berpindah dari gunung kuning ke gunung hitam, dan dari gunung hitam ke gunung putih, ia harus melakukannya.'

294.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to stand in the prayer of repentance, bow three rak'ahs then prostrate, then bow three more rak'ahs then prostrate.
294.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berdiri dalam shalat taubat, ruku tiga rakaat kemudian sujud, kemudian ruku tiga rakaat lagi kemudian sujud.

295.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ bowed and lengthened the bowing, then raised his head and said: 'Allah hears the one who praises Him,' then stood and lengthened the standing, then bowed and lengthened the bowing, then prostrated. He did the same in the second rak'ah. Then he said: 'The sun and moon are two of the signs of Allah. They do not eclipse for the death or life of anyone. So when this happens, rush to prayer.'
295.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ruku dan memanjangkan ruku, kemudian mengangkat kepalanya dan berkata: 'Allah mendengar orang yang memuji-Nya,' kemudian berdiri dan memanjangkan berdiri, kemudian ruku dan memanjangkan ruku, kemudian bersujud. Beliau melakukan hal yang sama pada rakaat kedua. Kemudian beliau bersabda: 'Matahari dan bulan adalah dua dari tanda-tanda Allah. Keduanya tidak gerhana karena kematian atau kehidupan seseorang. Maka ketika ini terjadi, bersegeralah untuk shalat.'

296.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ never saw clouds without his face showing agitation. But when it rained, he would calm down.'
296.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah melihat awan tanpa wajahnya menunjukkan kegelisahan. Tetapi ketika hujan turun, beliau tenang.'

297.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ greeted the people of al-Baqi saying: 'Peace be upon you, O abode of a believing people. We shall surely join you. O Allah, do not deprive us of their reward and do not put us to trial after them.' Then he turned and saw her, and said: 'Alas for her — had she been able, she would not have done otherwise.'
297.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ menyambut penduduk al-Baqi' dengan berkata: 'Salam atasmu, wahai tempat tinggal kaum yang beriman. Kami pasti akan menyusul kalian. Ya Allah, jangan halangi kami dari pahala mereka dan jangan uji kami setelah mereka.' Kemudian beliau berpaling dan melihatnya, dan bersabda: 'Kasihan dia — jika ia bisa, ia tidak akan melakukan hal lain.'

298.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that after the verse was revealed — 'You may defer any of them you will and receive any you will' — she was asked what she used to say to the Prophet ﷺ. She said: 'I would say to him: If the choice is mine, then O Messenger of Allah, I do not want to give anyone precedence over you.'
298.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa setelah ayat diturunkan — 'Kamu boleh menangguhkan siapapun di antara mereka yang kamu kehendaki dan menerima siapapun yang kamu kehendaki' — ia ditanya apa yang biasa ia katakan kepada Nabi ﷺ. Ia berkata: 'Aku biasa berkata kepadanya: Jika pilihan ada padaku, maka wahai Rasulullah, aku tidak ingin mendahulukan siapapun atasmu.'

299.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Sawda said: 'O Messenger of Allah, I have given my day to Aisha.' So the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to allocate her day to Aisha.
299.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Saudah berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, aku telah memberikan hariku kepada Aisyah.' Maka Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengalokasikan hari Saudah untuk Aisyah.

300.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Among the good omens of a woman are: the ease of her proposal, the ease of her dowry, and the ease of her womb.'
300.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Di antara pertanda baik seorang wanita adalah: kemudahan lamarannya, kemudahan maharnya, dan kemudahan rahimnya.'
